#2188 P2 — M1 & M2 veto-at-render evidence (default seed; cat/semantic scales are hue-seeded, so both clubs render these identically)

BEFORE = raw Tailwind utilities (+ the now-deleted dark remap). AFTER = signed-off scale vocabulary (cat1–5 step 9 / ring step 7; warning step 3/6/11). Meaning is carried by icon + label, never colour alone.

M1 — bed-allocation booking strips: 9-hue hash → cat1–5 (collisions accepted)

Light

BEFORE — 9 raw hues (bg-{red,orange,amber,lime,emerald,cyan,blue,violet,fuchsia}-500)
AFTER — cat1–5 step 9 solid, ring = step 7 (5 hues; hash % 5)

Dark

BEFORE — 9 raw hues (dark remap tinted the strips)
AFTER — cat1–5 step 9 (dark), ring = step 7 (dark)

M2 — orange callout → warning scale (BUMPED / PARTIALLY_REFUNDED)

Light

BEFORE — bg-orange-50 / border-orange-200 / text-orange-800
⚠ Booking bumped — a higher-priority allocation displaced this bed.
AFTER — bg-warning-3 / border-warning-6 / text-warning-11
⚠ Booking bumped — a higher-priority allocation displaced this bed.

Dark

BEFORE — old colored-callout remap (deleted in P2)
⚠ Booking bumped — a higher-priority allocation displaced this bed.
AFTER — bg-warning-3 / border-warning-6 / text-warning-11 (dark)
⚠ Booking bumped — a higher-priority allocation displaced this bed.

M2/M5-adjacent — how the STATUS CHIPS actually ship (owner: veto here if unwanted)

The orange→warning fold above is true for a standalone warning callout. But the booking/payment status chips deviate: BUMPED and PARTIALLY_REFUNDED ship on cat4 (categorical), and PENDING (booking) ships on cat5 — NOT the warning scale. Reason: amber owns warning-primary (PAYMENT_PENDING → warning), and the status-map colour-uniqueness constraint forbids two warning chips in one column. So the orange/yellow siblings re-home to categorical slots by hue proximity. This is the M2/M5-adjacent deviation — meaning is carried by icon + label, never colour alone.

Light — status chips (bg step-3 / text step-11)

● BUMPED (cat4) ● PARTIALLY_REFUNDED (cat4) ● PENDING (cat5) ● PAYMENT_PENDING (warning)

Dark — status chips

● BUMPED (cat4) ● PARTIALLY_REFUNDED (cat4) ● PENDING (cat5) ● PAYMENT_PENDING (warning)
